words.spanish: Esta mesa es para seis personas
words.english: This table is for six people

conversations.topic: Cambio de vuelo y preparativos de viaje

dialog.speaker: Inés
dialog.spanish: Salimos para Lima mañana a las seis, pero la aerolínea cambió el vuelo por la tormenta.
dialog.english: We are leaving for Lima tomorrow at six, but the airline changed the flight because of the storm.

dialog.speaker: Mateo
dialog.spanish: Qué mala suerte. ¿Nos reprogramaron para la noche o para el viernes?
dialog.english: What bad luck. Did they reschedule us for tonight or for Friday?

dialog.speaker: Inés
dialog.spanish: Para esta noche, aunque tendremos que esperar en el aeropuerto por varias horas.
dialog.english: For tonight, although we will have to wait at the airport for several hours.

dialog.speaker: Mateo
dialog.spanish: Entonces te mando los documentos por correo electrónico para que no los busques en la maleta.
dialog.english: Then I will send you the documents by email so you do not have to look for them in the suitcase.

dialog.speaker: Inés
dialog.spanish: Gracias. También necesito cambiar unos euros por soles antes de abordar.
dialog.english: Thanks. I also need to exchange some euros for soles before boarding.

dialog.speaker: Mateo
dialog.spanish: Hazlo en la casa de cambio que está por la puerta ocho; suele ser más rápida.
dialog.english: Do it at the exchange booth by gate eight; it is usually faster.

questions.question: ¿Por qué cambió la aerolínea el vuelo?
options: Por un error en el pasaporte
Por una avería en la maleta

questions.question: ¿Qué quiere cambiar Inés antes de abordar?

conversations.topic: Cambiar un regalo en una tienda

dialog.speaker: Clara
dialog.spanish: Busco un regalo para mi abuela y quiero cambiar esta bufanda por algo más ligero.
dialog.english: I am looking for a gift for my grandmother and I want to exchange this scarf for something lighter.

dialog.speaker: Leo
dialog.spanish: Claro. ¿La compró por internet o aquí en la tienda?
dialog.english: Of course. Did you buy it online or here in the store?

dialog.speaker: Clara
dialog.spanish: La compré aquí por recomendación de mi hermana, pero es demasiado pesada para el clima de su ciudad.
dialog.english: I bought it here on my sister's recommendation, but it is too heavy for the climate in her city.

dialog.speaker: Leo
dialog.spanish: En ese caso, le sugiero este pañuelo de seda. Es perfecto para viajar y está en oferta por treinta dólares.
dialog.english: In that case, I suggest this silk scarf. It is perfect for traveling and it is on sale for thirty dollars.

dialog.speaker: Clara
dialog.spanish: Me gusta. ¿Puede envolverlo para regalo y enviarlo para el lunes?
dialog.english: I like it. Can you wrap it as a gift and send it by Monday?

dialog.speaker: Leo
dialog.spanish: Sí, se lo enviamos por mensajería exprés para que llegue a tiempo.
dialog.english: Yes, we will send it by express delivery so that it arrives on time.

questions.question: ¿Por qué quiere cambiar la bufanda?
options: Porque es demasiado pesada para ese clima
Porque ya no tiene el recibo
questions.answer: Porque es demasiado pesada para ese clima

questions.question: ¿Para cuándo quiere Clara que envíen el nuevo regalo?

conversations.topic: Entregas y plazos en la oficina

dialog.speaker: Sofía
dialog.spanish: Terminé el informe por la mañana, pero todavía falta una gráfica para la presentación del jueves.
dialog.english: I finished the report in the morning, but a chart is still missing for Thursday's presentation.

dialog.speaker: Bruno
dialog.spanish: Envíamela por correo hoy, por favor, para que el equipo de diseño la revise antes de las cinco.
dialog.english: Send it to me by email today, please, so that the design team can review it before five.

dialog.speaker: Sofía
dialog.spanish: De acuerdo. También hablé por teléfono con el cliente y pidió dos copias por persona para la reunión.
dialog.english: All right. I also spoke with the client by phone and he asked for two copies per person for the meeting.

dialog.speaker: Bruno
dialog.spanish: Perfecto. Ese proyecto es para una cadena de hoteles, así que cuidemos cada detalle.
dialog.english: Perfect. That project is for a hotel chain, so let us take care with every detail.

dialog.speaker: Sofía
dialog.spanish: ¿Quiere que vaya por la autopista o por el centro para entregar las muestras?
dialog.english: Do you want me to go via the highway or through downtown to deliver the samples?

dialog.speaker: Bruno
dialog.spanish: Ve por la autopista; llegarás más rápido y volverás para el almuerzo.
dialog.english: Go via the highway; you will arrive faster and be back for lunch.

questions.question: ¿Qué ruta le recomienda Bruno para entregar las muestras?

conversations.topic: Trabajo comunitario y organización de voluntarios

dialog.speaker: Elena
dialog.spanish: Trabajo para una fundación que reparte comida por todo el barrio los sábados.
dialog.english: I work for a foundation that distributes food all through the neighborhood on Saturdays.

dialog.speaker: Raúl
dialog.spanish: Qué bien. A mí me eligieron por mi experiencia en logística para coordinar a los voluntarios.
dialog.english: That is great. I was chosen because of my logistics experience to coordinate the volunteers.

dialog.speaker: Elena
dialog.spanish: Entonces, para mí, tú eres la persona ideal para organizar la ruta.
dialog.english: Then, in my opinion, you are the ideal person to organize the route.

dialog.speaker: Raúl
dialog.spanish: Gracias. Los paquetes fueron preparados por estudiantes de la universidad y están listos desde temprano.
dialog.english: Thanks. The packages were prepared by university students and have been ready since early morning.

dialog.speaker: Elena
dialog.spanish: Perfecto. ¿Salimos para el centro comunitario ahora o esperamos a Julia?
dialog.english: Perfect. Do we leave for the community center now or do we wait for Julia?

dialog.speaker: Raúl
dialog.spanish: Esperemos diez minutos por cortesía, pero después nos vamos para no llegar tarde.
dialog.english: Let us wait ten minutes out of courtesy, but after that we should go so we are not late.

questions.question: ¿Por qué eligieron a Raúl para coordinar a los voluntarios?
options: Por su trabajo en la universidad

questions.question: ¿Por qué deciden esperar diez minutos antes de salir?
options: Por una avería en el camión

sentences.spanish: Sofía empezó a trabajar en el informe por la mañana para terminarlo con calma antes de la reunión.
sentences.english: Sofía started working on the report in the morning so she could finish it calmly before the meeting.

sentences.spanish: Lo escribió por tres horas seguidas y luego se lo mandó a Bruno por correo electrónico.
sentences.english: She worked on it for three straight hours and then sent it to Bruno by email.

sentences.spanish: El cliente quería las versiones impresas para el viernes, así que el equipo revisó cada detalle con cuidado.
sentences.english: The client wanted the printed versions by Friday, so the team reviewed every detail carefully.

sentences.spanish: Más tarde, Sofía salió por la autopista para entregar unas muestras en un hotel del centro.
sentences.english: Later, Sofía left via the highway to deliver some samples to a downtown hotel.

sentences.spanish: Volvió cansada, pero contenta, porque todo había salido según el plan.
sentences.english: She came back tired but happy because everything had gone according to plan.

sentences.spanish: Para ella, ese día demostró que la organización vale tanto como el talento.
sentences.english: For her, that day showed that organization matters just as much as talent.

sentences.spanish: Clara quería comprar un regalo para su abuela, pero cambió de idea por el clima cálido de su ciudad.
sentences.english: Clara wanted to buy a gift for her grandmother, but she changed her mind because of the warm climate in her city.

sentences.spanish: Había elegido una bufanda por recomendación de su hermana, aunque no era la opción más práctica.
sentences.english: She had chosen a scarf on her sister's recommendation, although it was not the most practical option.

sentences.spanish: En la tienda encontró un pañuelo de seda hecho por artesanos locales y decidió cambiar la bufanda por ese detalle más ligero.
sentences.english: At the store, she found a silk scarf made by local artisans and decided to exchange the scarf for that lighter gift.

sentences.spanish: Pagó por mensajería exprés para que el paquete llegara para el lunes sin falta.
sentences.english: She paid for express delivery so that the package would arrive by Monday without fail.

sentences.spanish: Cuando su abuela la llamó por teléfono, le dio las gracias por pensar en algo tan útil.
sentences.english: When her grandmother called her by phone, she thanked her for choosing something so useful.

sentences.spanish: Clara sonrió porque, para ella, un buen regalo debe servir y emocionar al mismo tiempo.
sentences.english: Clara smiled because, for her, a good gift should be useful and moving at the same time.

sentences.spanish: Cada sábado, Elena sale para el centro comunitario antes de las ocho para organizar la distribución de comida.
sentences.english: Every Saturday, Elena leaves for the community center before eight to organize the food distribution.

sentences.spanish: Raúl fue elegido por su experiencia en logística y por su paciencia con los voluntarios nuevos.
sentences.english: Raúl was chosen because of his logistics experience and his patience with the new volunteers.

sentences.spanish: Los paquetes, preparados por estudiantes universitarios, llegan clasificados por zona y por número de familias.
sentences.english: The packages, prepared by university students, arrive sorted by zone and by number of families.

sentences.spanish: Luego el equipo recorre el barrio por varias horas para entregar todo antes del mediodía.
sentences.english: Then the team goes through the neighborhood for several hours to deliver everything before noon.

sentences.spanish: Para muchos vecinos, esa visita semanal es importante no solo por la comida, sino también por la conversación.
sentences.english: For many neighbors, that weekly visit matters not only because of the food but also because of the conversation.

sentences.spanish: Al terminar, Elena siempre agradece a todos por su tiempo y por su compromiso.
sentences.english: At the end, Elena always thanks everyone for their time and commitment.

speaking.title: Práctica oral de por y para
speaking.description: Contrasta por y para al hablar de causa, propósito, plazos, intercambio, duración y destino.

question.spanish: Di en español: I work for an international company.
question.english: Say in Spanish: I work for an international company.

answer.spanish: Trabajo para una empresa internacional.
answer.english: I work for an international company.

question.spanish: Di en español: I called you by phone last night.
question.english: Say in Spanish: I called you by phone last night.

answer.spanish: Te llamé por teléfono anoche.
answer.english: I called you by phone last night.

question.spanish: Di en español: We are leaving for Seville tomorrow morning.
question.english: Say in Spanish: We are leaving for Seville tomorrow morning.

answer.spanish: Salimos para Sevilla mañana temprano.
answer.english: We are leaving for Seville tomorrow morning.

question.spanish: Di en español: Thanks for helping me with the move.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Thanks for helping me with the move.

answer.spanish: Gracias por ayudarme con la mudanza.
answer.english: Thanks for helping me with the move.

question.spanish: Di en español: I need the report by Friday.
question.english: Say in Spanish: I need the report by Friday.

answer.spanish: Necesito el reporte para el viernes.
answer.english: I need the report by Friday.

question.spanish: Di en español: We walked through the forest for one hour.
question.english: Say in Spanish: We walked through the forest for one hour.

answer.spanish: Caminamos por el bosque durante una hora.
answer.english: We walked through the forest for one hour.

question.spanish: Di en español: I bought these flowers for my mother.
question.english: Say in Spanish: I bought these flowers for my mother.

answer.spanish: Compré estas flores para mi madre.
answer.english: I bought these flowers for my mother.

question.spanish: Di en español: I exchanged my seat for one by the window.
question.english: Say in Spanish: I exchanged my seat for one by the window.

answer.spanish: Cambié mi asiento por uno junto a la ventana.
answer.english: I exchanged my seat for one by the window.

question.spanish: Di en español: I did it out of curiosity, not out of obligation.
question.english: Say in Spanish: I did it out of curiosity, not out of obligation.

answer.spanish: Lo hice por curiosidad, no por obligación.
answer.english: I did it out of curiosity, not out of obligation.

question.spanish: Di en español: This gift is for you.
question.english: Say in Spanish: This gift is for you.

answer.spanish: Este regalo es para ti.
answer.english: This gift is for you.

question.spanish: Di en español: The bridge was designed by a Chilean engineer.
question.english: Say in Spanish: The bridge was designed by a Chilean engineer.

answer.spanish: El puente fue diseñado por una ingeniera chilena.
answer.english: The bridge was designed by a Chilean engineer.

question.spanish: Di en español: We studied for three hours before the exam.
question.english: Say in Spanish: We studied for three hours before the exam.

answer.spanish: Estudiamos por tres horas antes del examen.
answer.english: We studied for three hours before the exam.

question.spanish: Di en español: I am sending you the contract by email.
question.english: Say in Spanish: I am sending you the contract by email.

answer.spanish: Te envío el contrato por correo electrónico.
answer.english: I am sending you the contract by email.

question.spanish: Di en español: In my opinion, that solution is the fairest.
question.english: Say in Spanish: In my opinion, that solution is the fairest.

answer.spanish: Para mí, esa solución es la más justa.
answer.english: In my opinion, that solution is the fairest.

question.spanish: Di en español: We need ten chairs for the meeting.
question.english: Say in Spanish: We need ten chairs for the meeting.

answer.spanish: Necesitamos diez sillas para la reunión.
answer.english: We need ten chairs for the meeting.

question.spanish: Di en español: We went through the market before going home.
question.english: Say in Spanish: We went through the market before going home.

answer.spanish: Pasamos por el mercado antes de volver a casa.
answer.english: We went through the market before going home.

question.spanish: Di en español: I work here to pay for my studies.
question.english: Say in Spanish: I work here to pay for my studies.

answer.spanish: Trabajo aquí para pagar mis estudios.
answer.english: I work here to pay for my studies.

question.spanish: Di en español: They sold the bicycle for two hundred euros.
question.english: Say in Spanish: They sold the bicycle for two hundred euros.

answer.spanish: Vendieron la bicicleta por doscientos euros.
answer.english: They sold the bicycle for two hundred euros.

question.spanish: Di en español: Leave home now so that you arrive on time.
question.english: Say in Spanish: Leave home now so that you arrive on time.

answer.spanish: Sal de casa ahora para llegar a tiempo.
answer.english: Leave home now so that you arrive on time.

question.spanish: Di en español: We have meetings twice per week.
question.english: Say in Spanish: We have meetings twice per week.

answer.spanish: Hacemos reuniones dos veces por semana.
answer.english: We have meetings twice per week.
